features: DUZZIT GREENER CLEANING SPONGE & MAGIC ERASER: Remove stubborn marks and stains from all household surfaces with this magical Cellulose Sponge Eraser from Duzzit Greener Cleaner

CHEMICAL FREE: Unique cleaning sponge, just add water to quickly and magically erase grime, marks, stains and dirt from all household surfaces, appliances, walls, furniture and toys. Use to keep hot tubs and pools sparkling clean

GREENER CLEANING: The specially developed sponges are ideal to clean all household surfaces, chemical cleaning agents are not required, simply use with water. Suitable for outdoor items including garden furniture
FLEXIBLE: The cellulose sponge is flexible to ensure easy cleaning of all surfaces. For stubborn marks on walls and doors simply turn the sponge over to use the fibre side
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: 100 Percentsustainable wood pulp and recycled fibre. Pack of 2
description: Product Description Duzzit Greener Cleaner Cellulose Sponges erase stubborn marks and stains from walls, doors and household surfaces. The cellulose sponge absorbs water, wiping up liquids with ease, for tougher more stubborn residue, erase with the fibre topped side of the sponge. Pack of 2. Ingredients celluose
